description: Configure a Critical Congenital Heart Disease (CCHD) screening simulation in OpenICE using two 'Pulse Oximeter' simulated devices. The Pre-ductal (Right Hand) device must be set to 98% SpO2 and the Post-ductal (Foot) device to 90% SpO2. Document the simulation with a screenshot at /home/ga/Desktop/cchd_screen_evidence.png and a mapping report at /home/ga/Desktop/cchd_device_map.txt that links each device's Unique Device Identifier (UDI) to its respective SpO2 setting and ductal position.
